name: cardinal-codex-plugin
description: Connect Codex to Cardinal telemetry and MCP with a browser-approved device-code flow.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Cardinal telemetry and MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Cardinal connects Codex to a Cardinal workspace through a device-code flow, configures the unified Cardinal MCP endpoint, and installs local Codex hooks that emit agent-session telemetry for Cardinal Outcomes.
